entries.title: The Siege of Aurifiel's Keep
entries.subtitle: Season 10 · The Rise and Fall of Warlord Kati
body: It was in this era that the Hyperborean warlord Kati rose to power. Few would be safe should they cross this one-woman army. Her flame burned brightly — but shortly.

Her forces — Hyperborean warriors, warrior slaves, and assorted allies — laid siege to the black keep of Lord Aurifiel in the Silkwood Forest, and an epic battle unfolded. Trebuchet bombardments tore holes in the walls, and even the entrance gate collapsed. Assault after assault failed to take hold, yet Aurifiel's soldiers and the Legio Vulpis mercenaries were pushed ever further into the main keep.

The last assault was meant to wipe out the defenders within. But a brazen charge of mercenary cavalry disrupted the Hyperborean attack, splitting the attackers in half. Those who breached the keep were overwhelmed by the defenders and the traps laid inside, while the rest were forced into retreat.

Yet the dark lord would not savor his victory for long. Several days later, Aurifiel was murdered by the Hyperboreans. Even they could not celebrate — the losses of the battle meant the end of their rise. With her forces scattered, the warlord Kati is rumored to have vanished into the wilderness as mysteriously as she appeared.
